name: Feature request
about: Suggest a platform, observability, governance, or analytics enhancement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Proposal

Describe the feature.

## Business or Platform Value

What reliability, governance, observability, or analytics problem does it solve?

## Suggested Implementation

Mention impacted areas:

- ingestion
- dbt
- quality
- observability
- governance
- dashboard
- docs

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Local CI passes with `python3 -B scripts/local_ci.py`
- [ ] Documentation is updated
- [ ] Tests or validation artifacts are included
